summary: Iteration 109 - i18n namespace separation and language_switcher default-visible testing. All features PASS. LanguageContext correctly implements route-based namespace preloading (auth/dealer/admin). Language switcher in DealerLayoutV2 is visible by default even when corporate header config is missing or doesn't include the block.

issues: Hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - not blocking but should be fixed

i18n_namespace_separation.description: i18n files correctly separated by language + namespace

route_preload_rules.description: resolveRouteNamespaces function correctly maps routes to namespaces

login_page_language_switching.tr_banner: Avrupa'nın en yeni ve geniş ilan platformu Annoncia'ya hoş geldiniz...
login_page_language_switching.de_banner: Willkommen bei Annoncia, Europas neuer und umfangreicher Kleinanzeigenplattform...
login_page_language_switching.fr_banner: Bienvenue sur Annoncia, la plus nouvelle et vaste plateforme d'annonces en Europe...
login_page_language_switching.toggle_cycle: TR -> DE -> FR -> TR works correctly

dealer_layout_language_switcher_visibili.description: Language switcher visible by default even when config is missing
dealer_layout_language_switcher_visibili.implementation: hasCorporateBlock returns true for language_switcher when row/block missing

dealer_menu_translations_fr.search_placeholder: Rechercher une annonce, un client ou un rapport

critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext namespace loader implementation is correct - uses dynamic imports for lazy loading
Route preload rules correctly implemented in resolveRouteNamespaces function
DealerLayoutV2 language_switcher default-visible fallback implemented correctly with info console logs
Minor: DealerMessages page has HTML nesting hydration warnings (span/tbody/tr) - cosmetic issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n namespace separation fully implemented: tr/de/fr folders with auth.json, dealer.json, admin.json in each. Route preload rules: /login=/register=/verify-email->auth, /dealer/*->dealer, /admin/*=/backoffice/*->admin, others lazy. Language switcher in DealerLayoutV2 is visible by default via hasCorporateBlock fallback logic - console logs confirm this behavior. All dealer.menu.* translations verified for TR/DE/FR.
